page_title: 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane waterproof medical fabric - Arox T0 WR/WP - Ariteks
spec_line: 70 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
description_blocks: 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane waterproof fabric for all kind of medical cloth. Tested for EN 14126. Arox T0 WR/WP fabrics can be used for medical cover.
It can be washed at 60'C and used again.

Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
Medical, antibacterial, inherent antibacterial antiviral workwear fabrics.
70 g/m² , 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric

75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane waterproof fabric for all kind of medical cloth. Tested for EN 14126. Arox T0 WR/WP fabrics can be used for medical cover. It can be washed at 60'C and used again. Certified for EN 14126.
